text:
Madwig (マドウィック, Madouikku) is one of five personal guards for Prince Tyson. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 36, Chapter 375 Hunter × Hunter - Volume 38, Chapter 400 

Appearance

Madwig has a large nose, pronounced brow, a moustache and beard, and long hair that goes past his neck. He wears the usual black suit and tie of a bodyguard.

Personality

In his roleplaying as a hitman with amnesia, Madwig is appreciative of Tyson's help and has a playful demeanor. 

Plot

Succession Contest arc

Madwig is first seen when Tyson preaches from her Book of Tyson to all her staff. He is then seen performing in an acapella chorus with three other Tyson bodyguards at a Sunday banquet. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 37, Chapter 383 

In the Prince's quarters, Tyson enthusiastically introduces Madwig as a hit man with amnesia, and Madwig reveals that the only thing he remembered was how to handle a gun, playfully holding up a finger gun and saying, "Bang". He adds that he is only there because Prince Tyson took him in. After the rest of Tyson's bodyguards introduce themselves, Giuliano realizes that they are acting out the characters Tyson likes.
